title: Clusta Genomics
description: Corporate website for a molecular diagnostics and life science company transforming Africa's health through precision genomics. Features product showcases, innovation highlights, and a dedicated diagnostics platform.

title: AlphaMead Gate Access
description: A smart visitor management system for gate access control. Enables security personnel to verify visitor codes, scan QR codes, record exits, and manage visitor and exit logs in real time.

title: EMR App
description: Electronic Medical Records application designed to help healthcare providers efficiently manage patient data, treatments, track medical history, and streamline clinical workflows.

title: Restaurant & Delivery App
description: An elegant fine dining and delivery platform combining culinary artistry with seamless ordering. Features menu browsing, real-time order tracking, and a premium dining experience with delivery options.

title: Lagos Nightlife
description: A dynamic web platform for an exclusive Lagos lounge, focusing on high-impact visual storytelling and functional service integration.

title: Movie Streaming App
description: A responsive movie and TV streaming platform with search, recommendations, and detailed movie information.
